title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling infrastructure at Shopify, trends in database innovation, the emergence of new database companies every 15 years, challenges in AI coding agents, and hiring strategies for elite engineers in the AI era.
